appDesc.message: Scoop AI chat conversations into tamo (a local harvester) via its localhost inbox. Data never leaves localhost.

labelRecall.message: Search past context (result is copied → paste into an AI)

labelFab.message: Always show the 🎣 button on supported sites

saved.message: Saved. Use "Check connection" to verify reachability and the token.

pairFail.message: Pairing failed: check that `tamo serve` is running and the port is right

healthOkNoToken.message: Connected to tamo ✓ (no token yet — auto-pairs on first delivery)

healthTokenBad.message:
Server reachable but the token does not match
→ press "Re-pair" to fix

healthNg.message:
Connection failed: $1
(start `tamo serve`; check the port, default 8787)

recallEmpty.message:
No results: $1
Try another term, or scoop the conversation first

recallCopied.message:
Copied ✓ ($1 chars)
Paste it straight into ChatGPT / Gemini / Claude

scooping.message: Scooping… (long conversations can take ~15s to load their history)

scoopRestricted.message:
Cannot scoop this page ($1)
Protected pages such as chrome:// and PDF viewers are not supported

postIngestNote.message: tamo serve will ingest it on the next poll

fabOn.message: The 🎣 button will show on supported sites (takes effect after tab reload)

fabOff.message: 🎣 button hidden (open tabs update after a reload)

autoPairFail.message: Auto-pairing failed: start `tamo serve` and press "Re-pair", or paste the value of `tamo token` and save

bgPairFail.message: Cannot pair with tamo (is `tamo serve` running?)

bgNotPaired.message: Not paired yet (press "Re-pair" while `tamo serve` is running)

fabOrphaned.message: The extension was updated — reload this tab (F5) to fix it
